sub_modules.gaussian3x3_blur: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil using fixed 1-2-1 separable coefficients normalized by 16.
sub_modules.high_frequency: Combinational pointwise subtraction of blurred pixel from original pixel.
sub_modules.gain_scale: Combinational signed multiply of high-frequency component by the runtime gain input.
sub_modules.reconstruct_saturate: Combinational pointwise reconstruction with saturation to the output pixel range.
